pattern: Test each candidate by inspecting its digits: it qualifies only when every digit is nonzero and divides the original value.
hints: A number with a zero digit can never qualify.
Extract digits one at a time and check divisibility against the original number.
Iterate the inclusive range and collect every value whose digits all divide it.

edge_inputs.description: small range with single-digit and trap values
range skipping numbers with zero digits
range whose endpoints contain zero digits

stress.description: random valid sub-ranges within the bounds
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    a = rng.randint(1, 10000)
    b = rng.randint(1, 10000)
    lo, hi = min(a, b), max(a, b)
    return [lo, hi]
